verdict_reasoning: HSPA5/GRP78/BiP is canonically an ER-luminal HSP70 chaperone, but has well-documented cell-surface display on tumor cells and under ER stress (csGRP78), where it acts as a signaling receptor and is the target of multiple clinical anti-GRP78 antibody, ADC, and CAR-T programs. The cancer/stress-induced ecto-pool qualifies as cell_state_induced. Not yes because baseline localization is ER lumen with no intrinsic membrane anchor; surface display is restricted to stressed/transformed cells.
